Svelte Contents Cheatsheet

A BookBank Field Guide · Client-Side

Svelte.

Reactive UIs built on runes —
no server, no SvelteKit, no magic.

Told by The Clear Mentor — a patient senior engineer, example-first.
You already know frameworks. Let's get the Svelte 5 model right.

The Path

What we'll cover

Nine short chapters, each landing an example before it explains it. This is Svelte 5, client-side only — no SvelteKit, no server rendering, just the component model and its runes.

  1. Runes & ReactivityThe mental model shift
  2. $derivedComputed values, never stale
  3. $effectSide effects, done right
  4. $props & $bindableComponent inputs, two ways
  5. Control Flow{#if} {#each} {#await}
  6. SnippetsReusable markup, bye slots
  7. Bindings & EventsDOM in sync with state
  8. Transitions & AnimationMotion with a purpose
  9. Sharing StateModules, stores & context
  10. CheatsheetEverything, one page
How to use this book Every chapter opens with a runnable example before it explains the theory. Turn pages with the ← → arrows (or the buttons below). Tap ↑ to jump back to this Contents page.
Contents Begin ›
⌂ Library
